creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch does not apply cleanly:

[dvl@ava-pkg-02prd:/usr/dvl/ports-head/devel/ruby-gems] $ patch < ~/tmp/patch 
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- b/devel/ruby-gems/Makefile	
|+++ b/devel/ruby-gems/Makefile	
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hunk #2 failed at 19.
1 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- b/devel/ruby-gems/distinfo	
|+++ b/devel/ruby-gems/distinfo	
--------------------------
Patching file distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- b/devel/ruby-gems/pkg-plist	
|+++ b/devel/ruby-gems/pkg-plist	
--------------------------
Patching file pkg-plist using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 46.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 69.
Hunk #4 succeeded at 83.
Hunk #5 succeeded at 105.
Hunk #6 succeeded at 167.
Hunk #7 failed at 186.
1 out of 7 hunks failed--saving rejects to pkg-plist.rej
done
